title: Saddle Optimizer: Duality-Gap Descent
strategies: plain gradient descent-ascent at the default step (theta=0, alpha=0): reproduces the evaluator's weak reference and diverges on strongly-coupled saddles -> ~0.1
conservative small-step GDA: shrink eta so the bilinear rotation is damped by step size alone; converges slowly but reliably above the baseline

optimism + negative momentum + per-player steps: use theta>0 (extrapolated gradient) and alpha<0 (negative momentum) with eta_x != eta_y to cancel the saddle rotation; since the model matrices are public, grid-search the four coefficients against the exact duality gap

structured / spectral tuning: estimate the coupling and curvature spectra from P, Q, B to pick near-optimal constant coefficients, approaching (but never reaching) the unreachable ideal gap in the fixed step budget
